/usr/bin/c++ CMakeFiles/backend.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/math/matrix.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/nn/layer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/nn/activations.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/nn/neural_network.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/nn/loss.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/io/mnist_reader.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/io/dataset_utils.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/io/weights_io.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/app/trainer.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/app/predictor.cpp.o CMakeFiles/backend.dir/api/api_server.cpp.o -o backend
